description_long: This rifle features a modern, tactical design with a bullpup configuration, where the action and magazine are located behind the trigger for a compact profile. The exterior is finished in a digital camouflage pattern, blending shades of green, black, and gray, suitable for urban or woodland environments. It is equipped with a prominent optical sight mounted on the top rail, enhancing aiming precision. The rifle has a sleek, angular body with a pistol grip and an integrated trigger guard, contributing to its ergonomic handling. The barrel is relatively short and thick, suggesting a focus on maneuverability and stability. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal with some polymer components for weight reduction and durability.
description: A compact, bullpup-style rifle with digital camouflage, an optical sight, and a sleek, angular body designed for tactical use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length, digital camouflage, optical sight, and ergonomic pistol grip.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel opening and the narrow, streamlined profile.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same camouflage pattern, sight, and grip details as view 0.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the stock end and the alignment of the sight and barrel.
